response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks demonstrable AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, and the 15-year continuous engineering track record required — his career gap and fragmented timeline raise red flags about sustained senior-level impact.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and DevOps
concerns: 15-month career gap and inconsistent employment timeline undermine continuity expectation
No evidence of AI/ML product ownership or cloud platform strategy leadership at scale
Lacks advanced degree in AI or recognized public expertise in AI/ML research or systems
